samples:
I'm dying
No, I can't get over this anymore
Indisposed
The vision of suffering on this torture core


I put my fist so tight around my neck
And I dig a hole for myself down to the core
My pride is destroyed 'cause I fight alone
Since all along you fools, I was awake
Digging through the mud and getting dirty
Don't try to wash me white, oh no !


I put my fist so tight around my neck
And dig a hole in the mud !
Get ready !

Don't get too close
Yeah ! Dig deep inside yourself and find shelter !

There's light at the end of the tunnel ! Don't bow down and pray ! Get out of there ! Go now ! ! ! !
Don't get too close !! Yeah !!


I dig a hole in the mud !



All right ... Dig a hole ... Dig a hole … Dig a hole … Dig a hole !

Don't cross my mind and don't you try
I tell myself I just don't care anymore
Now I understand that pain is real
Leave me alone, don't waste my time
You talk too loud, I can't even hear
If I fight it long enough I will learn
All the reasons why I do what I do
My reason for surviving


Life is out there in this vastness
Out there where we fly
But now I am ready to land
On Earth, right here on Earth
Enter my vision, enter my dreams
Open your eyes and see the stars
Open your heart to life awake
And dive into our structure

Fly free as the vultures fly away
Fly away from a cage so tight
We all have to go where they fly
In space, round and round we spin 


Just like this vulture flying high
Get ready to meet your master race
Yeah get ready to meet your master race !

Lost in a circle, round and round
Spinning 'round on the ground
Nowhere to get away from me
No space for you to hide


I'm crushed under, so grind me down
So long I put myself through all this torture
In circles, round and round, always coming around
Circle, round and round, always coming around


Crushed under load of your weight, my bones are falling apart
Broken frame collapsing now, too heavy to lift myself up
I can feel myself sinking down, land is running out underneath my feet
My soul is leaving my body, disappearing in thin air

This giant, round and round spinning 'round !
Indestructible force !

Round and round ... Round and round !
Round and round … Round and round !
Round and round … Round and round !
Round and round … Round and round !

Round and round … Round and round !
Round and round … Round and round !
Round and round … Round and round !
Round and round … Round and round !

Round and round !

Get ready to dive into the realm of destruction
You cannot protect yourself, from this storm you are facing


Open your eyes and face reality now !
You have the strength inside you !

Against all those who fight for this cause , we will overcome !

Fire ! Fire ! Burning down low !  We rise again 
No force on earth can destroy us ! We raise our hands in thanks


The fire is coming straight at us !! The flames are rising straight up !!!



Wake up , face reality !!!!   Enter a realm of illusions !  Destruction !!! 

Awaken and protect !!!!!     Protect this land that sustains life !!!    Creation !!!!!!


Enter the circle of protection now ... Raise your arms awake !!!

Enter the circle of protection now .... Raise your arms awake !!!

Enter the circle of protection now...  Raise your arms awake !!!

Enter the circle of protection now.....   Raise your arms awake !!!

Enter the circle of protection now.........Raise your arms awake !!!

I'm falling down the endless spiral
Of lost illusions of this world, I drown !

Lost in a circle round my master race !

I'll fly away to better places and land !
Out there are stars and planets turning round !

All the worlds I see ! Out there in space ... !
You have a star for me !
Don't bow down low before ... !!!

Lost in a circle round my master race !

On my own I'll fight until my last breath !
Awakened ! Unconscious ! Conquering ! New realm ! ! ! !


Indisposed !! Lost forever in circles !! Lost !!
Infi... ( Infi ) nite !!  ( Infi ) nde !   ( Infi ) nite !!
Infi… ( Infi ) nite !     ( Infi ) Nde … !!



Lost in a circle round my master race !

Lost in a circle round my master race !

No sense pretending to be innocent
Don't even try, no reason now
Kill this beast you call "reason"
Break the rules and break away the law


There is a vision coming alive in my mind
Like bright fireflies flying free
Awakening from the sleep I lay awake on the rock
I understand it all


Create your own reality!
You create yourself to become what you want to become
And fight for better
All alone against all of them

Enter your own realm - open the door
Leave all illusions behind - step inside
Set a course straight - go along until the end
Open your eyes embrace !

Enter your own realm - open the door ! Enter your own realm ! ! !

This force that runs through you creates the world around
From matter and energy made – structures are falling apart !
This force is running through me too  -  create another 
Create  -  create  -  create  another dimension !

The door is open wide
Don't be afraid to enter in
You will see the lights coming from the past
Now that you have entered


In the dust land, I stand
On my own against all this force of evil
Lost in space now on the flame
I feel alive and bright!
All right there, meet the master race
Feel so good being a part of it all
And yet we destroy what we create
Put our children in danger



Enter us ! Enter us ! Enter us ! Enter us !

Master Race Master Race ! Master Race Master Race !
Master Race Master Race ! Master Race Master Race !
Master Race Master Race ! Master Race Master Race !
Master Race Master Race ! Master Race Master Race !

We are all angels with broken wings
Enter us ! Enter us ! Enter us ! Enter us !

Master Race Master Race ! Master Race Master Race !
Master Race Master Master ! Master Race Master Master !
Master Race Master Race ! Master Race Master Master !
Master Race Master Race ! Master Race Master Master !

Your life is in my hands, I'm ready to take over
The red hot iron beam through your vision and legs
Against the wall of a mountain range that are rising up high


You just try to get out and run
But you're crushed beneath the load
From inside you understand now
That it's better not to try anymore
And falling down so low
Is all part of living on
Don't bow your neck to any god but this one


If you could dig deep enough into your core and find the strength
Put out your hand and grab tight with all your might
All power was put at your command right from the start


Leave everything behind you know now
Take what's yours by force
Enter your mind become reborn and awaken awake now
Get ready for battle ride on straight till dawn comes
This fight must be long as time itself
Leave all the rest, forget the past
Everything becomes clear if you face the facts

Face reality

Lost in this circle
Of all illusions, I belong
I'm not alone
A devil is coming out


On the rise, on the run
Against the wind and rain
Against my better judgment, I fight


Leave me alone to live
Remain by myself in silence
Don't want to destroy what is mine
Don't get so close to me !


Indisposed
Feel like a vulture dying on the cross
So long to prepare
This living torture I embrace !


Leave me alone to live
Remain by myself in silence
Don't want to destroy what is mine
Don't get so close to me !


Indisposed
Feel like a vulture dying on the cross
So long to prepare
This living torture I embrace !

Witchcraft I create
Destroyed illusions, destruction I build
Life comes down crashing
Destruction I have chosen !

Leave me alone to live
Remain by myself in silence
Don't want to destroy what is mine
Don't get so close to me !

The lion is king of the jungle
And he will always be around
He doesn't even try to understand
Human beings, but they must bow down low
We need you on our side
Please accept us as we are


Leave me alone in this forest
Awake, don't fall asleep again
Wake up to find a star in the sky
Indisposed by this force of nature


Open my heart and dive in
I pray for shelter from all harm


Don't even try to comprehend
Incredible forces out there
Our planet Earth is round
And rotating 'round the sun
Always watch us grow and learn respect
For these giant worlds that rule over us
This force of nature is so bright 
It fills me inside until I burst wide open !  

Leave me alone in this forest
Awake, don't fall asleep again
Wake up to find a star in the sky
Indisposed by this force of nature


Open my heart and dive in
I pray for shelter from all harm
